steps.t: Issuriel of Lothlórien can be found on the high flet atop Cerin Amroth. Haldir has told you of the preparations being made for the departure of the Go…
Issuriel is on the high flet atop Cerin Amroth, in Lothlórien. You have recounted the rest of the tale concerning your escape from Rushdurinul with Ma…
